title: Apple Banana Fruit Puree
description: Smooth, naturally sweet puree of cooked apple and ripe banana with a hint of cinnamon. Great as a dessert or topping.

ingredients.note: very ripe for sweetness and easy blending
Fuji, Gala, or Honeycrisp — peeled and cored

steps.instruction: Peel, core, and dice the apple. Sauté in a small pan with 1 tbsp water over medium heat for 8–10 minutes until very soft.
Alternatively, microwave diced apple with 1 tbsp water, covered, for 3–4 minutes until very tender.
Add banana chunks, cooked apple, lemon juice, and cinnamon (if using) to blender.
Blend on high for 60 seconds until completely smooth.
If the consistency is too thick, add 1 tbsp apple juice and blend again.
Serve immediately or refrigerate up to 24 hours.

notes: Apples must be cooked — raw apple is too fibrous to blend completely smooth. This puree also works great as a topping over oatmeal or yogurt.
